(i) whose stressed loans are available for acquisition in terms of Clause 58 of the
Master Direction – Reserve Bank of India (Transfer of Loan Exposures) Directions, 2021
as amended from time to time or as part of a resolution plan approved under the Insolvency
and Bankruptcy Code, 2016 or in terms of any other policy of the Reserve Bank of India

heading: Section 4 of the Companies Act, 1956;”.
